title: SEC6: ED25519_MULTICODEC named constant vs magic bytes
description: const ED25519_MULTICODEC at identity.rs:10 names the multicodec prefix with spec reference. Prevents magic bytes [0xed, 0x01] from scattered throughout codebase. Centralizes future codec changes (if needed for spec updates) and makes intent explicit. The constant is used consistently in make_did_key (line 154) and validated strictly in validate_did_key (line 184).
